content.full_text:
FPPC

FEB 7 2 04 PM '90

DRUG USE
IS
LIFE ABUSE

MEMBERS OF THE CITY COUNCIL
ANTHONY L. BLAND
LAWRENCE F. BUCHHEIM
KENNETH E. FRIESS
GARY L. HAUSDORFER
PHILLIP M. SCHWARTZE

CITY MANAGER
STEPHEN B JULIAN

February 5,1990


Katherine Donovan, General Counsel
Fair Political Practices Commission
428 "J" Street - 6th Floor
Sacramento, CA 95814

Re:     Request for Informal Opinion/San Juan Capistrano Planning Commissioner
        James Erickson

Dear Ms. Donovan:

I am the City Attorney of the City of San Juan Capistrano . On behalf of San Juan
Capistrano Planning Commissioner James Erickson, this letter is to request a formal
written opinion pursuant to Title 2, Cal. Adm. Code Section 18329.

This request for a conflict of interest opinion arises out of the facts and
circumstances described in Mr. Erickson's letter of January 31, 1990 addressed to
this office. (see attachment)

This is to further advise that Mr. Erickson has less than a 10% ownership interest in
his firm. Also, I have briefly discussed this issue with John Wallace of your staff.

We would appreciate a formal written opinion on this matter by February 21, 1990 if
at all possible.

Very truly yours,

[signature]

JOHN R. SHAW
City Attorney

JRS/ef

cc:     James Erickson, Esq.




32400 PASEO ADELANTO, SAN JUAN CAPISTRANO, CALIFORNIA 92675 • (714) 493-1171

LAW OFFICES

NOSSAMAN, GUTHNER, KNOX & ELLIOTT
A PARTNERSHIP INCLUDING PROFESSIONAL CORPORATIONS

WALTER J. NOSSAMAN
1886-1964

LOS ANGELES
THIRTY-FIRST FLOOR
445 SOUTH FIGUEROA STREET
LOS ANGELES, CA 9007I-I602
(213) 612-7800

SAN FRANCISCO
THIRD FLOOR
100 THE EMBARCADERO
SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94105-1295
(415) 543-2700

WRITER'S DIRECT DIAL NUMBER

CENTER TOWER
650 TOWN CENTER DRIVE
SUITE 1250
COSTA MESA, CA 92626-1981
(714) 835-9000
FACSIMILE (714) 834-0238

January 31, 1990

WARREN ELLIOTT
OF COUNSEL
WASHINGTON, D.C.
SIXTH FLOOR
1140 19TH STREET, N.W.
WASHINGTON, D.C. 20036-6699
(202) 223-9100

SACRAMENTO
FOURTH FLOOR
915 L STREET
SACRAMENTO, CA 95814-3701
(916) 442-8888

REFER TO FILE NUMBER


John Shaw, Esq.
City Attorney
City of San Juan Capistrano
32400 Paseo Adelanto
San Juan Capistrano, California  92675

Re:  RZ 89-07, Site Plan Review 89-10 and Tentative
     Tract Map No. 14196 for Pacific Point Partners
     Project

Dear John:

          Neither I nor my firm represent Pacific Point
Partners, the limited partnership developing the project in San
Juan Capistrano which is subject to the above-reference city
entitlement procedures, or any of its general or limited
partners.  However, we do represent another limited partnership
entity developing property in the Elsinore area, the "North
Peak Partners".

          Both limited partnerships have different corporate
general partners, but these corporations have a common
individual shareholder of a significant portion if not all the
shares of both corporations.  TMC, another wholly-owned
subsidiary of this shareholder, also provides contractual
services to both corporations.  The two limited partnership
development entities are otherwise totally unrelated, so that
any success or failure of one has no financial effect upon the
other.

          The rezoning, site plan review and tentative tract map
approvals for the Pacific Point Partners' project are scheduled
to come before the Planning Commission, of which I am a member,
in the near future.  As a result, even though I and my firm

NOSSAMAN, GUTHNER, KNOX & ELLIOTT

John Shaw, Esq.
January 31, 1990
Page 2

have not and do not represent Pacific Point Partners in
connection with their San Juan Capistrano development or
otherwise. I need to know as soon as possible whether I should
recuse myself from participation in discussions, deliberations
and actions on this project because of this interlocking
shareholder interest in the two different corporate general
partners of the separate limited partnership entities
developing these two unrelated projects.

I would appreciate your advising me as promptly as
possible.

Very truly yours,

[signature]

James E. Erickson
of NOSSAMAN, GUTHNER, KNOX
& ELLIOTT

JEE:ag

ERICKSON:1096/66
